name: Renovation Project Intake
description: Building renovation project intake and existing conditions assessment. Evaluates a renovation project's scope definition, existing building conditions, unknown condition exposure, permit history, hazardous materials, budget adequacy, and team readiness to produce a renovation project profile with gap analysis, risk flags, and recommended pre-design actions.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Renovation Project Profile
types.description: Generated renovation project profile from intake session data.
